# `dnsight config validate`

Validate a dnsight configuration file.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source` | text | — | no | YAML file path, '-' for stdin, or omit for --config / discovery. |
| `--resolve` | bool | `false` | no | Resolve each manifest target after load. |
